snippet.title: Lehja | Abhi Dutt ft. Faisu & Jannat | Vikram M | Official Video | Romantic Song 2021 | Blive Music
snippet.description:
Sanjay Kukreja and BLive Music presents the most romantic hindi song of the year "Lehja" sung by Abhi Dutt Featuring Faisu & Jannat Zubair. The lyrics are penned by Azeem Shirazi and the music is directed by Vikram Montrose song directed by Rahul Shetty. This latest song is created by Mahesh Kukreja

#Lehja #Fainat #AbhiDutt #NewHindiSong #LoveSongs2021

Song - Lehja
Composer- Vikram Montrose
Singer - Abhi Dutt
Lyrics - Azeem Shirazi
Song Programmed and Arranged - Vikram Montrose
Song Mixed & Mastered by - Eric Pillai @ Future Sound Of Bombay
Mix Assistant Engineer - Michael Edwin Pillai
Harmoniums - Ali Aslam Shah
Vocals Recorded @ Vikram Montrose

snippet.title: West Bengal Assembly Election 2021 : ২য় দফায় রণক্ষেত্র নন্দীগ্রাম, রক্তাক্ত কেশপুর, ভোট পড়ল ৮০%
snippet.description:
নন্দীগ্রামের ভোটকে কেন্দ্র করে তুলকালাম ব্যাটলগ্রাউন্ড বয়াল। প্রায় দু’ঘণ্টা বুথের ভিতরেই রইলেন মমতা বন্দ্যোপাধ্যায়। বাইরে তখন সম্মুখসমরে তৃণমূল ও বিজেপির কর্মী সমর্থকরা। বৃহস্পতিবার সকাল থেকেই, একের পর এক ঘটনায় উত্তপ্ত ছিল গোটা নন্দীগ্রাম। ভোট শুরু হতে না হতেই নন্দীগ্রামের মির্জাচকে তৃণমূল কর্মীদের ভোটদানে বাধা দেওয়ার অভিযোগ ওঠে কেন্দ্রীয় বাহিনীর বিরুদ্ধে। অন্যদিকে নন্দীগ্রাম এক নম্বর ব্লকে সাত সকালেই বাইক বাহিনীর দাপট দেখা যায়। বাইকে কোনও দলের ঝান্ডা না থাকলেও, বিজেপি অভিযোগ করে, এই বাইক মিছিল করে তৃণমূল। নির্বাচন কমিশনে অভিযোগ জানানো হয়। নন্দীগ্রামের গড়চক্রবেড়িয়ায় লাঠিচার্জ করে জমায়েত হটিয়ে দেয় পুলিশ ও কেন্দ্রীয় বাহিনী। পালাতে গিয়ে ডোবায় পড়ে যান এক ব্যক্তি। বুথের আশেপাশে এবং রাস্তায় অবৈধ জমায়েত হঠাতে রাস্তায় নামেন নন্দীগ্রাম থানার দায়িত্বপ্রাপ্ত আইপিএস অফিসার নগেন্দ্রনাথ ত্রিপাঠী। এদিকে নন্দীগ্রামের ওসমানচকে অন্যের হয়ে ভোট দেওয়ার সময় হাতেনাতে ধরা পড়েন শেখ হানিফ নামে এক ব্যক্তি। সোনাচূড়ার নেতাজি মোড় এলাকায় বুধবার রাত থেকেই শুরু হয়েছিল বোমাবাজি। বৃহস্পতিবার সকাল থেকেও এলাকায় ছিল আতঙ্কের ছায়া। সব মিলিয়ে এবারের ভোটে সবথেকে চর্চিত কেন্দ্র নন্দীগ্রাম দিনভর ঘটনাবহুল।


#BengalElections2021 #Nandigram #Bayal #MamataBanerjee #SuvenduAdhikari #ABPAnanda #ABPLive

snippet.title: PANI DI GAL: Maninder Buttar feat. Jasmin Bhasin | Asees Kaur | MixSingh | JUGNI | Punjabi Song 2021
snippet.description:
White Hill Music presents the Latest Punjabi Songs 2021 "Pani Di Gal" from the album #Jugni by Maninder Buttar & Asees Kaur. Featuring Jasmin Bhasin.Lyrics by Maninder Buttar. Music by MixSingh. Directed by Robby Singh. Produced By Gunbir Singh Sidhu & Manmord Sidhu. In this song, the boy is convincing his love to say yes to him.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! 👀


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent’s Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

#clashofclans #hammerjam #seasonofupgrades

snippet.title: Maharashtra Second Lockdown : 2 एप्रिलनंतर लॉकडाऊनची शक्यता, नवे नियम काय असू शकतात?
snippet.description:
महाराष्ट्रात लॉकडाऊन ( Maharashtra Lockdown )लागणार की नाही, अशी धाकधूक लागलेली असतानाच आता एक मोठी शक्यता समोर आली आहे. महाराष्ट्रात 2 एप्रिलपासून ( 2 April 2021 ) लॉकडाऊन लागण्याची तयारी सुरु झाली असल्याची माहिती आहे. मिड डे ( Mid Day ) या इंग्रजी वृत्तपत्राने आपल्या सुत्रांच्या हवाल्याने याबाबतचं वृत्त दिलं आहे. मात्र, हा लॉकडाऊन मागील लॉकडाऊनहून ( Corona Lockdown Again ) काहीसा वेगळा असेल...काहिसा वेगळा म्हणजे नेमका ( Lockdown Guidelines ) कसा हेच आपण आजच्या व्हिडीओत समजून घेऊया

#MaharashtraLockdown #LockdownAgain #LockdownGuidelines

snippet.description:
Dangal: West Bengal Election 2021 पर चर्चा के दौरान वरिष्ठ पत्रकार जयंतो घोषाल ने कहा कि नंदीग्राम में मुस्लिम वोट बीजेपी को मिलेगा नहीं. शुभेंदु चाहता है हिंदू वोट एकजुट रहे. ममता वो हिंदू वोट का शेयर लेना चाहती हैं. अगर उनको शेयर मिलता है तो शुभेंदु हार जाएगा....

snippet.title: Indians And Food Delivery || Nazarbattu
snippet.description:
For Binomo Education, Click https://bit.ly/3e06HzD  and get Rs.65,000 for Binomo tutorial.
Use "BS132" promo code for +100% on the first deposit. Thank me later!  
Risk Warning! Your capital might be at risk!
Go subscribe to Binomo's Official Instagram Account - https://www.instagram.com/binomo/

India is an amazing country where a food delivery boy beats a girl for complaining about the food but the controversy takes a U-turn when the delivery boy's angle of the story comes in media according to which the girl had created the whole scene to avoid payment. We all order food online and have our sweet and bitter experiences with food delivery guys. Stories like zomato delivery guy eating food, people increasing waiting time in order to claim free food. In the end Zomato and swiggy delivery guys fill our empty stomachs and bring smiles to our faces.
Here we have tried to pick some funny moments of Indians and food delivery guys. We respect the profession and the companies who are in the business. Enjoy the video and next time when you order food say big thanks to the delivery guy because these guys were out when the whole country was in lockdown.
Share the video with your loved ones and spread laughter.
#onlineorder #fooddelivery

snippet.title: THE SUICIDE SQUAD - Rebellion Trailer
snippet.description:
Thought you might like this too. #TheSuicideSquad
 
https://www.facebook.com/thesuicidesquad
https://www.instagram.com/thesuicidesquad
https://twitter.com/SuicideSquadWB
https://www.thesuicidesquad.com
 
From writer/director James Gunn comes Warner Bros. Pictures’ superhero action adventure “The Suicide Squad,” featuring a collection of the most degenerate delinquents in the DC lineup.
 
Welcome to hell—a.k.a. Belle Reve, the prison with the highest mortality rate in the US of A.  Where the worst Super-Villains are kept and where they will do anything to get out—even join the super-secret, super-shady Task Force X.  Today’s do-or-die assignment?  Assemble a collection of cons, including Bloodsport, Peacemaker, Captain Boomerang, Ratcatcher 2, Savant, King Shark, Blackguard, Javelin and everyone’s favorite psycho, Harley Quinn.  Then arm them heavily and drop them (literally) on the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese.  Trekking through a jungle teeming with militant adversaries and guerrilla forces at every turn, the Squad is on a search-and-destroy mission with only Colonel Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave…and Amanda Waller’s government techies in their ears, tracking their every movement.  And as always, one wrong move and they’re dead (whether at the hands of their opponents, a teammate, or Waller herself).  If anyone’s laying down bets, the smart money is against them—all of them. 
 
The film stars Margot Robbie (“Birds of Prey,” “Bombshell”), Idris Elba (“Avengers: Infinity War”), John Cena (upcoming HBO Max series “Peacemaker,” “Bumblebee”), Joel Kinnaman (“Suicide Squad”), Jai Courtney (the “Divergent” franchise), Peter Capaldi (“World War Z,” BBC’s “Doctor Who” ), David Dastmalchian (upcoming “Dune,” “Ant-Man and the Wasp”), Daniela Melchior (“Parque Mayer”), Michael Rooker (the “Guardians of the Galaxy” films), Alice Braga (“Elysium”), Pete Davidson (“The King of Staten Island,” TV’s “Saturday Night Live”), Joaquín Cosio (“Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse,” TV’s “Narcos: Mexico”), Juan Diego Botto (“The Europeans”), Storm Reid (“The Invisible Man,” “A Wrinkle in Time”, “Euphoria”), Nathan Fillion (“Guardians of the Galaxy,” TV’s “The Rookie”), Steve Agee (“Brightburn,” “Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2”), Sean Gunn (the “Guardians of the Galaxy” films, the “Avengers” films), Mayling Ng (“Wonder Woman”), Flula Borg (“Ralph Breaks the Internet”), Jennifer Holland (“Brightburn,” upcoming HBO Max series “Peacemaker”) and Tinashe Kajese (TV’s “Valor,” “The Inspectors”), with Sylvester Stallone (the “Rocky,” “Rambo” and “Expendables” franchises), and Viola Davis (“Ma Rainey’s Black Bottom,” “Suicide Squad”).
 
Gunn (the “Guardian of the Galaxy” films) directs from his own screenplay, based on characters from DC.  The film is produced by Charles Roven and Peter Safran, with Zack Snyder, Deborah Snyder, Walter Hamada, Chantal Nong Vo, Nikolas Korda and Richard Suckle executive producing.
 
Gunn’s creative team includes director of photography Henry Braham (“Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2”), production designer Beth Mickle (“Captain Marvel”), editors Fred Raskin (“Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2,” “Once Upon a Time… In Hollywood”) and Christian Wagner (the “Fast & Furious” films) and Oscar-nominated costume designer Judianna Makovsky (“Guardians of the Galaxy Vol 2,” “Avengers: Endgame,” “Harry Potter and the Sorcerer’s Stone”).  The music is by John Murphy (“Kick-Ass”).
 
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents An Atlas Entertainment/Peter Safran Production, A James Gunn Film, “The Suicide Squad.”  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It is set for release nationwide in theaters and IMAX on August 6, 2021 and will be available on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

snippet.title: King - Godfather | The Gorilla Bounce | Prod. by Section 8 | Latest Hit Songs 2021
snippet.description:
✅🔥Follow🤴🏾On Instagram🔥✅
https://www.instagram.com/ifeelking


LYRICS:

eh! Je lagi dil utte satt,
Sochdeyaan saade ke main gaya kive bachh.

Mere beri puchhan haal mera,
Par mere apna ne sada mennu bheje khaali khatt.
X2

Verse1

Main muh utha ke seedha falak nu chumma,
Aaj aane ki ni lod mera naam thaave dhumma,
Munda jawani vich pair rakheya ni poora,
Ghar baar chhadd kalla shehr wich ghumma.
Milla ni mennu kadde koi godfather,
Na koi achhi salah na yara  koi seekh!!
Lo aaj baneya main apna hi father
Mere saare dukh dard maine aapayi karna theek!!

Maine jeetne di aadat ni paali,
Mere jeen da tareeka yara mere ton vi jada dheet!
Fuckk!!! main kadde jooth ni gaana,
Taj meri maa ae baaki thalle aa zamana

Jo mujhe ghaav dere sadiyon se kehte tere apne hain...aaj maine suna ni bahana!!


HOOK

eh! Je lagi dil utte satt,
Sochdeyaan saade ke main gaya kive bachh.
Mere beri puchhan haal mera,
Par mere apna ne sada mennu bheje khaali khatt.
X2

Verse2

Ekko cheez sikhayi sada zindagi hai maa ne
Putt aage badh pichhe vekhi na,
Jo hoya chhad de o beet gaya,
Tu duniya daari de ghulamma baare jada sochi na.
Ye duniya ghutne bhi tek degi
Tu bas maarke ye ghum zinda baatein likhe ja
Imtehaan aur upar wale ka hai rishta purana
Azmaaye tujhe aage dikhe ja.


Dhokebaazaan naal baithke ni khana Kadde baaki mere putt sada mauja lutti ja!
Fuckk!!! main kadde jooth ni gaana,
Taj meri maa ae baaki thalle aa zamana
Jo mujhe ghaav dere sadiyon se kehte tere apne hain...aaj maine suna ni bahana!!

HOOK

eh! Je lagi dil utte satt,
Sochdeyaan saade ke main gaya kive bachh.

Mere beri puchhan haal mera,
Par mere apna ne sada mennu bheje khaali khatt.
X2

snippet.title: Poles Apart | E03- Close But Apart Ft.Tanya, Abhishek, Rishhsome,Qabeer |Webseries|Hasley Originals!
snippet.description:
Kuvera is India’s First Free Direct Mutual Fund and Wealth management Platform.
Get kuvera here: http://bit.ly/3skNa0J

It’s Party Time!!! Reeya has organised a Birthday party at her residence and guess who are going to be the special guests? 
Yes, It’s Sagar and Jogi. A completely new experience for both of them and to be a topping on the cake Ronit, Reeya’s ex is also invited.
Now what will happen when Sagar and Ronit will come face to face? Will Sagar manage to be calm or are we gonna have some action?
Reeya aur Sagar ka pyaar hoga successful ya hone wali hai takraar?
Ab in questions ka answer ya toh samay de sakta hai ya is episode ki ending. 
So watch Poles Apart Episode 3 and enjoy the sweet & sour end of this amazing web-show brought to you by Hasley Originals.

snippet.title: Fitoor - Episode 16 Teaser - 1st April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Fitoor - Episode 16 Teaser - 1st April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

https://bit.ly/30JSSPr Geo is the hub for all your Pakistani entertainment needs! Hit the bell icon and subscribe to become a part of our growing community, now hitting the USA

Fitoor narrates a love story that transcends above all as a person in love is bound to forget about the worries of the past and the uncertainty of the future.
Despite being a successful architect, Haider feels lacking in his love life as he is still living with the memories of his love interest. On the other hand, Dilnasheen who hails from a middle-class background is deeply in love with her best friend's brother Hamza and both vows to be with each other forever without realizing the difficulties they might have to overcome. Living in her present, Dilnasheen�s life takes an unfortunate turn when she crosses paths with Haider. Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to forget their past and move on in their lives? Or will the past pay them a visit when they begin to settle down? Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to distinguish between their past and present?

Written By: Zanjabeel Asim
Directed By: Siraj ul Haq
Produced By: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

Cast :
Faysal Quraishi
Hiba Bukhari
Wahaj Ali
Kiran Haq

Farhan Ally Agha
Ainee Zaidi
Tipu Sharif
Kamran Jeelani
Mizna Waqas
Saif Ul Hassan

Faheema Awan
Kanwal Khan

snippet.title: Suez Canal Blocked: स्वेज़ नहर में फंसे जहाज़ को निकालने और उसके भविष्य की कहानी (BBC Hindi)
snippet.description:
मिस्र की स्वेज़ नहर में जाम खुल गया है. क़रीब एक हफ़्ते से वहां फंसे विशाल जहाज़ को बड़ी मशक्कत के बाद रास्ते से हटाया जा सका. टग बोट्स और ड्रेजर की मदद से 400 मीटर (1,300 फीट) लंबे 'एवर गिवेन' जहाज़ को निकाला गया. सैकड़ों जहाज़ भूमध्य सागर को लाल सागर से जोड़ने वाली इस नहर से गुज़रने का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं. ये दुनिया के सबसे व्यस्त व्यापारिक मार्गों में से एक है.

स्टोरी: टीम बीबीसी
आवाज़: गुरप्रीत सैनी
वीडियो एडिटिंग: दीपक जसरोटिया

#SuezCanal #SuezCanalBlocked #OilMarket

Corona Virus से जुड़े और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए यहां क्लिक करें : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=npgvIvfmNkE&list=PLYxuvEJLss6ByutcqkthikPxV3ccUkwPB

कोरोना वायरस से जुड़ी सारी प्रामाणिक ख़बरें पढ़ने के लिए क्लिक करें : https://www.bbc.com/hindi/international-51848794

ऐसे ही और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए चैनल सब्सक्राइब ज़रूर करें-
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCN7B-QD0Qgn2boVH5Q0pOWg?disable_polymer=true

बीबीसी हिंदी से आप इन सोशल मीडिया चैनल्स पर भी जुड़ सकते हैं-

फ़ेसबुक- https://www.facebook.com/BBCnewsHindi
ट्विटर- https://twitter.com/BBCHindi
इंस्टाग्राम- https://www.instagram.com/bbchindi/

बीबीसी हिंदी का एंड्रॉयड ऐप डाउनलोड करने के लिए क्लिक करें- https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=uk.co.bbc.hindi

Episode 3134: What Is Tapu Sena's Plan?
---------------------------------------------------------
Tapu Sena has a samosa party at Gogi's house. while having a samosa party Gogi pranks Tapu Sena. after their party they go to the society compound and there they meet Popatlal. Popatlal invites Tapu Sena to his house for dinner on Sunday but they deny it as they get only Sanday to spend time with their full Family. Popatlal feels sad for not having family so Tapu Sena plans to Surprise Popatlal. Watch the full episode now.


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com

 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

A government aided college, RK University, is on the verge of completing its golden jubilee but a bizarre event shuts it down indefinitely. Will RK University restore its lost glory?

snippet.title: Manjhi - The Mountain Man | Scene 3 | Nawazuddin Siddiqui | Radhika Apte | Viacom18 Studios
snippet.description:
Manjhi – The Mountain Man is a 2015 Indian Hindi-language biographical film based on the life of Dashrath Manjhi. Manjhi, widely known as the "Mountain Man", was a poor labourer in Gehlaur village, near Gaya in Bihar, India, who carved a path 9.1 metres (30 ft) wide and 110 metres (360 ft) long through a hill 7.6 metres (25 ft) high, using only a hammer and chisel.

#NawazuddinSiddiqui enacted the role of #DashrathManjhi, while Radhika Apte played Manjhi's wife. The film was released worldwide on 21 August 2015.

#ManjhiTheMountainMan 

Viacom18 Studios Handles :-

Facebook:- https://www.facebook.com/Viacom18Studios/
Twitter :- https://twitter.com/Viacom18Studios
Instagram:- https://www.instagram.com/viacom18studios

About Super Dancer 4 : 
---------------------------------------------------
Now in its fourth season, Super Dancer is a popular children's dance reality show. Spearheaded by Bollywood actress Shilpa Shetty, renowned choreographer Geeta Kapoor and Bollywood Director Anurag Basu, the show looks for 'Dance ka Kal'. After nationwide auditions, the judges select 12 children who are extraordinary dancers, aged between 4 to 13. These 12 dancers are paired with popular and able choreographers, the Super Gurus. Along with their Gurus, the kids compete to become Super Dancer - Dance Ka Kal.

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1207 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
While Soumya commences a desperate search for Heer and asks Sant for his help, Heer experiences another shock when coincidence makes Virat stand in front of her. Watch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Suez Canal: Tugboats sound horns as Ever Given container ship 'fully refloated'
snippet.description:
The giant container ship that has been blocking the Suez Canal was fully floated on Monday afternoon, according to the Suez Canal Authority (SCA), with footage shared online showing the vessel moving in the channel.

After hauling the fully laden 220,000-ton vessel over the canal bank, the salvage team was pulling the vessel toward the Great Bitter Lake, a wide stretch of water halfway between the north and south end of the canal, where the ship will undergo technical inspection, canal authorities said.

Satellite data from MarineTraffic.com confirmed that the ship was moving away from the shoreline toward the center of the artery.

Read more here: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/03/29/suez-canal-ever-given-container-ship-partially-refloated/

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube ► https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

snippet.title: Suez Canal | How will Blocked Ship get out? | Dhruv Rathee
snippet.description:
In the 150 year history of Suez Canal, it is the first time that a blockade like this has happened. Why did the Ever Given ship get stuck in the Suez Canal and what is being done to take it out? I explain all this in this video and the importance of Suez and Panama canals in the global trade today. I also explain why ship traffic is stuck behind the Suez Canal and they have a dilemma. Should they wait it out or should they take the route through the Cape of Good hope in South Africa.

snippet.title: Kutty Pattas Music Video | Ashwin | Reba John | Venki | Santhosh Dhayanidhi | Sandy
snippet.description:
A brilliantly vivid splash of colours and a wildly fun #KuttyPattas composed by the Raati fame #SanthoshDhayanidhi featuring the most exciting cast one could ask for! Is there a better way to head into the weekend? #Ashwin, the current darling of Tamil Television features alongside the stunningly beautiful #RebaJohn in this groovy music video directed by #Venky and choreographed by #Sandy. Watch it here and bring out the moves ! 

Stream now - https://SMI.lnk.to/KuttyPattas

Song - Kutty Pattas
Composed by - Santhosh Dhayanidhi
Featuring - Ashwin Kumar, Reba Monica John
Sung by - Santhosh Dhayanidhi, Rakshita Suresh
Lyrics - A.Pa Raja
Directed by - Venki
Cinematography - Harish Kannan
Choreography - Sandy Master
Set - Amaran
Editing - Krishna Kumar
DI - Suresh Ravi

Stills - Kiransa Photography

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 185 | Lakshya's Second Chance | Colors Rishtey
snippet.description:
Swara agrees to give Lakshya a second chance. Sanskaar requests Lakshya not to trouble or blackmail Swara and decides to take Ragini and Swara to the farm house.


'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?


#Swaragini #ColorsRishtey #Voot

snippet.title: Suez Canal reopens after giant stranded ship is freed - BBC News
snippet.description:
Traffic has resumed in the Suez Canal after a giant, stranded container ship blocking it for nearly a week was finally freed by salvage crews.

Tug boats honked their horns in celebration as the 400m-long (1,300ft) Ever Given was dislodged on Monday with the help of dredgers and tug boats.

Hundreds of ships are waiting to pass through the canal which links the Mediterranean to the Red Sea via Egypt.

It is one of the world's busiest trade routes.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

LYRICS MODERN RANJHA:


Main aj da aan modern ranjha,
Gaddiya v mere kol panj aa  X2

Kyunki milne nu time te ni jaaida,


Naar pichey aapa dil ni dukhaaida,
Naar pichey aapa dil ni dukhaaida,
Oh bina paani, bina khaare peg laaida
Oh bina paani, bina khaare peg laaida


Main aj da aan modern ranjha,
Gaddiya v mere kol panj aa 


Dekh taur mitthiye tu sardaar di,
Gall karda aan sidhi aar paar di,
Kinni allaraan di mere utte nazra,
Bebe har shaniwaar nu utaardi

Hegiyaan ni fikkran, mukk diyaan liquor-aan
Batue nu roz hi mukaaida
Munda muhfatt bhot, karda ni sugarcoat 
Veeere, Koda pegg laa k muh ni banaaida


Naar pichey aapa dil ni dukhaaida,
Naar pichey aapa dil ni dukhaaida,
Oh bina paani, bina khaare peg laaida
Oh bina paani, bina khaare peg laaida

 
Kamm kumm di tan worry koi na, koi na
Game jittne di hurry koi na, koi na
Tu kahe tan puuri attt chaklaan, chaklaan
Light weight gall kari koi na, koi na  X2


Kehndi pyaar mein kardi aa,
Mere utte ni tu karleh yakeen
Mein v sidha ohda muh te kehta,
Menu kudi lagdi tu mean

Gharo picho rajje hoye aa, hanji rajje hoye aa
Taahi faida niyo chakkida chaddaaida
Channde hoye aa, hannde hoye aa
Naaale senu na sikhaa tu paahda 27 da,

Naar pichey aapa dil ni dukhaaida,
Naar pichey aapa dil ni dukhaaida,
Oh bina paani, bina khaare peg laaida X2

#Singhsta #YoYoHoneySingh #ModernRanjha

snippet.title: Gadas ने किया Babita के घर Dinner -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता-Ep 3133-30th Mar, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/dplnk?schema=sony://asset/1000113272#utm_source=YOUTUBE&utm_medium=slate&utm_campaign=YT_traffic

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3133: Babita Invites Gada Family On Dinner
---------------------------------------------------------
As there is no gas cylinder at Jethalal's home, Bapu Ji, Jethalal and Tapu decide to out for dinner as Bapu Ji and Jethalal reached the society compound they find Babita coming to their place to give them rusgulla. Babita finds out about their situation of dinner so she invites them to her house for dinner. Watch the full episode now.


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

Ohi haal hai ...

Sach vi supna jeha 
Lagda ae... 
Aaj menu London vi Jalandar jeha 
Lagda ae..

Diseyan menu tu...
Aaj pher pyar hogaya...

snippet.title: Plz Don't Put Sodium Metal In Water - Top Science Experiments
snippet.description:
यह विडियो सिर्फ मनोरंजन ओर शिक्षा के लिए बनाई गई है इस विडियो में किए गए किसी भी प्रयोगों को दुबारा करने कि कोशिश ना करें 
Sodium is a chemical element with symbol Na (from Latin natrium) and atomic number 11. It is a soft, silvery-white, highly reactive metal. Sodium is an alkali metal, being in group 1 of the periodic table, because it has a single electron in its outer shell that it readily donates, creating a positively charged atom—the Na+ cation. Its only stable isotope is 23Na. The free metal does not occur in nature, but must be prepared from compounds. Sodium is the sixth most abundant element in the Earth's crust, and exists in numerous minerals such as feldspars, sodalite and rock salt (NaCl). Many salts of sodium are highly water-soluble: sodium ions have been leached by the action of water from the Earth's minerals over eons, and thus sodium and chlorine are the most common dissolved elements by weight in the oceans.

सोडियम रुपहली चमकदार धातु है। अगर इसे पानी मे फैक दिया जाए तो एक तेज़ धमाके के साथ हाइड्रोजन गैस निकलती है जो कि आग पकड़ती है 
इसी वजह से इसे केरोसिन या मिनरल ऑइल में रखा जाता है 
यह बहुत ही खतरनाक एक्सपरिमेंट है इसलिए इसे अपने घर या स्कूल या कही भी ट्राई करने की कोशिश ना करे क्योकि इसमे आपको नुकसान हो सकता है 
आज के लिए बस इतना ही मिलते हैं अगली ट्रिक्स में 
warning: this video is only for entertainment purposes. if you rely on the information portrayed in this video you assume  the responsibility for the results have fun but always think ahead and remember that every project try is at your own risk

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1206 & 1207 | Recap
snippet.description:
While Angel hires a contract killer to kill Soumya, Heer informs Preeto that she has parted from Virat and will not return home. Will Heer learn about Soumya? Watch the latest episode on Voot.

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KvW8epq68trmgmuFgW1dWBY

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 184 | The Separation Of Swara & Sanskaar | Colors Rishtey
snippet.description:
Prem saves the family from the dacoits. The family agrees with Sanskaar's decision to separate with Swara. Laksh cuts himself on Swara's departure.


'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?


#Swaragini #ColorsRishtey #Voot
